convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Layout Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-preserve-layout.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf's standard textbox recognition mode to retain the original layout.

convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Enhanced Recognition
convert-pdf-to-docx-enhanced.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a DOCX document using Aspose.Pdf with the default enhanced flow mode for complex tables and graphics.

convert-pdf-to-doc-default.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Default Settings
convert-pdf-to-doc-default.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and save it as a DOC document using the default text extraction options.

convert-pdf-to-doc-image-extraction.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Image Extraction
convert-pdf-to-doc-image-extraction.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to a DOC document using Aspose.Pdf while extracting only images via custom recognition mode.

convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Automatic Content Detection
convert-pdf-to-docx-auto-detection.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf with DocSaveOptions.Mode set to Flow for automatic content detection.

convert-pdf-to-doc-textbox-mode.title: Convert PDF to DOC with Textbox Mode
convert-pdf-to-doc-textbox-mode.description: Shows how to convert a PDF file to a DOC file using Aspose.Pdf while setting DocSaveOptions.Mode to Textbox to extract only plain text.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-metadata.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, setting author and title metadata, and saving it as a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-footnotes.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Footnote Preservation
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-footnotes.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf with EnhancedFlow recognition mode to retain footnotes and other layout details.

convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Extract Images
convert-pdf-to-docx-extract-images.description: The example loads a PDF, converts it to a DOCX file using Aspose.Pdf, and then extracts all embedded images from the PDF pages, saving them as PNG files to a designated output folder.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-json-report.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with JSON Report
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-json-report.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF file to DOCX format, collect conversion statistics, and output a JSON report summarizing the operation.

convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Compress to ZIP
convert-pdf-to-docx-and-zip.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf and then compressing the resulting DOCX into a ZIP archive for storage.

convert-pdf-to-docx-then-pdfa.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and then to PDF/A
convert-pdf-to-docx-then-pdfa.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF file to DOCX format and subsequently create a PDF/A‑1B compliant document from the generated DOCX.

convert-pdf-to-docx-with-hyphenation.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Hyphenation Settings
convert-pdf-to-docx-with-hyphenation.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, configuring DocSaveOptions, and saving it as a DOCX file where hyphenation is automatically applied.

convert-pdf-to-docx-add-table-of-figures.title: Convert PDF to DOCX and Add Table of Figures
convert-pdf-to-docx-add-table-of-figures.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf and generating a Table of Figures by extracting images from the PDF.

convert-pdf-to-docx-embed-custom-fonts.title: Convert PDF to DOCX with Embedded Custom Fonts
convert-pdf-to-docx-embed-custom-fonts.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to DOCX using Aspose.Pdf while registering and embedding a custom TrueType font to preserve document appearance.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-default.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Default Options
convert-pdf-to-pptx-default.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and save it as an editable PPTX file with the default PptxSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Slides as Images
convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX file where each slide is rendered as a raster image using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf while attaching a custom progress handler to monitor conversion progress.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
batch-convert-pdfs-to-pptx-slidesasimage.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files in a folder to PPTX presentations using Aspose.Pdf, enabling the SlidesAsImages option to rasterize each slide.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress-handle.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Progress Handler
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-progress-handle.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf and attach a custom progress handler to log conversion progress events.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images-dpi.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Slides as Images and Custom DPI
convert-pdf-to-pptx-slides-as-images-dpi.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf, exporting each slide as an image and setting a high‑resolution DPI.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Compress the Result
convert-pdf-to-pptx-and-compress.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf and then recompress the generated PPTX (a ZIP package) to reduce its file size.

convert-pdf-to-pptx.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx.description: Loads a PDF document and saves it as a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf's PptxSaveOptions.

pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa-conversion.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and then to PDF/A
pdf-to-pptx-to-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf, then convert the PPTX to a PDF/A‑1B compliant document for archival purposes.

pdf-to-pptx-with-speaker-notes.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Add Speaker Notes from Annotations
pdf-to-pptx-with-speaker-notes.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to a PPTX presentation with Aspose.Pdf, extracting annotation contents from each PDF page, and (optionally) inserting those contents as speaker notes into the corresponding slides using Aspose.Slides.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-custom-properti.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Custom Document Properties
convert-pdf-to-pptx-with-custom-properti.description: Loads a PDF, sets both standard and custom document properties, and converts it to a PPTX file using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-embed-custom-fonts.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Embedded Custom Fonts
convert-pdf-to-pptx-embed-custom-fonts.description: The example converts a PDF document to a PPTX presentation while embedding specified custom fonts to ensure consistent appearance across devices.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.title: Convert PDF to PPTX with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v2.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation using Aspose.Pdf's Document.Save method.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-images.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Extract Images with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-images.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to PPTX format and then extract all embedded images from the original PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-slide-titles.title: Convert PDF to PPTX and Extract Slide Titles to CSV
convert-pdf-to-pptx-extract-slide-titles.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf and then extracting the first non‑empty line from each PDF page as a slide title, writing the results to a CSV file.

add-logo-to-pdf-and-convert-to-pptx.title: Add Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
add-logo-to-pdf-and-convert-to-pptx.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, stamping a logo image onto each page, and then saving the document as a PPTX file.

convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.title: Convert PDF to PPTX using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-pptx__v3.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to a PPTX presentation with Aspose.Pdf, creating a sample PDF if the source file is missing.

convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Single-Page HTML with Embedded Resources
convert-pdf-to-single-page-html.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and saving it as a single-page HTML file while embedding images, CSS, and fonts (WOFF) to preserve the original formatting.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page HTML
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-html.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and save it as multi‑page HTML by enabling the SplitIntoPages option.

pdf-to-html-with-svg-images.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Extract SVG Images
pdf-to-html-with-svg-images.description: Loads a PDF (creating a sample if missing) and saves it as HTML using Aspose.Pdf, directing each rendered image to a specified folder as SVG files, with platform‑specific handling for GDI+ availability.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enable SVG graphics compression via HtmlSaveOptions, and save the document as an HTML file.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-background.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-background.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while rendering all page background images as a single embedded PNG per page.

convert-pdf-to-per-page-html.title: Convert PDF to Per‑Page HTML Files
convert-pdf-to-per-page-html.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and save each page as an individual HTML file by enabling the SplitIntoPages option.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-toc.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Table of Contents
convert-pdf-to-html-with-toc.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF into separate HTML pages and generate a simple HTML table of contents that links to each page.

convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-subfo.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Per-Page Image Subfolders
convert-pdf-to-html-per-page-image-subfo.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while storing each page's images in separate subfolders via a custom resource‑saving strategy.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.title: Convert PDF to HTML with SVG Compression
convert-pdf-to-html-with-svg-compression.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enable SVG compression via HtmlSaveOptions, and save the document as HTML.

convert-pdf-to-html-png-background__v2.title: Convert PDF to HTML with PNG Page Backgrounds
convert-pdf-to-html-png-background__v2.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to HTML using Aspose.Pdf while rendering each page's background as a PNG image.

pdf-to-html-merge-back-to-pdf.title: Convert PDF to HTML pages, merge into one HTML, then back to PDF
pdf-to-html-merge-back-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates splitting a PDF into separate HTML files per page, combining those HTML pages into a single document, and converting the merged HTML back into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-to-html-zip-archive.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Create ZIP Archive
pdf-to-html-zip-archive.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, converting each page to separate HTML files, and packaging the resulting files into a ZIP archive for distribution.

convert-pdf-to-minified-html.title: Convert PDF to Minified HTML
convert-pdf-to-minified-html.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to convert a PDF document to a single HTML file and then apply simple minification to reduce its size for faster web loading.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-embedded-custom.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Embedded Custom Fonts
convert-pdf-to-html-with-embedded-custom.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to HTML using Aspose.Pdf and embed the PDF fonts in web‑compatible formats (WOFF, TTF, EOT) via @font‑face rules in the generated CSS.

convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.title: Convert PDF to Responsive HTML with Custom CSS
convert-pdf-to-responsive-html.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to a single HTML file using Aspose.Pdf, then injecting a viewport meta tag and linking a responsive CSS stylesheet for mobile‑friendly layout.

convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Apply Custom CSS
convert-pdf-to-html-with-custom-css.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a single‑file HTML document using Aspose.Pdf and injecting a link to an external CSS stylesheet.

convert-pdf-to-html-and-generate-sitemap.title: Convert PDF to HTML and Generate Sitemap XML
convert-pdf-to-html-and-generate-sitemap.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF file to an HTML document using Aspose.Pdf and then create a simple sitemap.xml that lists the generated HTML page for SEO purposes.

convert-pdf-to-html-pages-with-index.title: Convert PDF to Separate HTML Pages with Index
convert-pdf-to-html-pages-with-index.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into individual HTML files using Aspose.Pdf and generate an index.html that links to each page.

pdf-to-html-to-docx-embed-fonts.title: Convert PDF to HTML and then to DOCX with Embedded Fonts
pdf-to-html-to-docx-embed-fonts.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to HTML using Aspose.Pdf, then loading the HTML and saving it as a DOCX with fonts embedded to ensure consistent rendering.

convert-pdf-to-html-and-pptx.title: Convert PDF to HTML and PPTX with Embedded Fonts
convert-pdf-to-html-and-pptx.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to HTML with WOFF font embedding and to PPTX with cached glyphs for uniform font appearance using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-bmp-images.title: Convert PDF to BMP Images Using BmpDevice
convert-pdf-to-bmp-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and convert each page to a BMP image using BmpDevice with default settings.

convert-pdf-to-jpeg-images.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG Images
convert-pdf-to-jpeg-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, and save the pages as JPEG files using JpegDevice with default quality.

convert-pdf-to-gif.title: Convert PDF Pages to GIF Images
convert-pdf-to-gif.description: Loads a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and converts each page to a GIF image using GifDevice with default parameters.

convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, render each page to a PNG image at a specified resolution, and enable a transparent background for the output images.

convert-pdf-to-emf-images.title: Convert PDF Pages to EMF Images
convert-pdf-to-emf-images.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and save each page as an EMF vector image while preserving vector data.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF using TiffDevice
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and converting all pages into a single multi‑page TIFF file using TiffDevice with custom TIFF settings.

convert-pdf-to-svg-images.title: Convert PDF to SVG Images with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-svg-images.description: Loads a PDF file and saves each page as an SVG image using the default SvgSaveOptions, producing separate SVG files for multiple pages.

convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.title: Convert PDF to Multi‑Page TIFF
convert-pdf-to-multi-page-tiff__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert all its pages into a single multi‑page TIFF using the default TiffDevice settings.

extract-pdf-page-region-to-png.title: Extract PDF Page Region as PNG
extract-pdf-page-region-to-png.description: Demonstrates rendering a PDF page to a PNG image and cropping a specific rectangle defined in PDF points to obtain a region image.

convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
convert-pdf-page-to-jpeg.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, select a specific page, and render it as a JPEG image using JpegDevice with the default DPI.

batch-pdf-to-png-converter.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG Images Preserving Folder Structure
batch-pdf-to-png-converter.description: Demonstrates how to recursively locate PDF files, convert each page to a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images while preserving the original directory hierarchy.

batch-pdf-to-jpeg-converter.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
batch-pdf-to-jpeg-converter.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of multiple PDF files in a folder to separate JPEG images using Aspose.Pdf with a custom file‑naming pattern.

batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF Archives
batch-convert-pdfs-to-multi-page-tiff.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF files and convert each one into a multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf with default compression.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-and-validate.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b and Validate
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-and-validate.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to PDF/A‑1b format using Aspose.Pdf, log conversion errors, validate the resulting file against PDF/A‑1b standards, and save the compliant document.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa3b-with-font-substitu.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b with Font Substitution
convert-pdf-to-pdfa3b-with-font-substitu.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF to PDF/A‑3b using Aspose.Pdf, enabling default font substitution for missing fonts and saving the result.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-4 with Auto-Tagging
convert-pdf-to-pdfa4-with-auto-tagging.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document to PDF/A‑4 format and enable automatic tagging during the conversion using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-skip-errors.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A‑1b with Skip on Errors
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-1b-skip-errors.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF to PDF/A‑1b using Aspose.Pdf while skipping elements that cannot be converted by setting ConvertErrorAction to None (skip). The example also logs conversion details and saves the resulting file.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-throw-on-error.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-3b with Throw on Error
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-3b-throw-on-error.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑3b using Aspose.Pdf and configuring the conversion to throw exceptions on errors by setting ConvertErrorAction to Throw.

convert-pdf-to-pdfa-4-with-error-action.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-4 with Error Action
convert-pdf-to-pdfa-4-with-error-action.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, configuring PdfFormatConversionOptions to convert it to PDF/A‑4 while specifying a ConvertErrorAction, performing the conversion, and saving the resulting file with a log.

add-attachment-convert-to-pdfa-3b.title: Add Attachment and Convert PDF to PDF/A‑3b
add-attachment-convert-to-pdfa-3b.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external text file into a PDF, then convert the document to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf and save the result.

add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa.title: Add External XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
add-xml-attachment-to-pdfa.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A-1b and embedding an external XML file as a file‑attachment annotation.

replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.title: Replace Missing Fonts During PDF/A Conversion with Font Substitution
replace-missing-fonts-pdfa-conversion.description: Demonstrates how to set a fallback font using FontRepository.Substitutions and convert a PDF to PDF/A‑1b while handling missing fonts.

enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.title: Enable Auto‑Tagging for PDF/A Conversion
enable-auto-tagging-pdfa-conversion.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to PDF/A (e.g., PDF/A‑1B) with auto‑tagging enabled using Aspose.Pdf's conversion options.

convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
convert-epub-to-pdf-custom-page-size.description: Shows how to load an EPUB file using EpubLoadOptions with a custom page size and convert it to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-markdown-to-pdf-preserve-code-bl.title: Convert Markdown to PDF Preserving Code Blocks
convert-markdown-to-pdf-preserve-code-bl.description: Demonstrates loading a Markdown file with MdLoadOptions and converting it to a PDF while keeping code blocks intact using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HP‑GL/2 Vector Support
convert-pcl-to-pdf-hpgl2.description: Demonstrates loading a PCL file (including HP‑GL/2 vectors) using PclLoadOptions and saving it as a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

convert-postscript-to-pdf.title: Convert PostScript File to PDF
convert-postscript-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PostScript (.ps) file using PsLoadOptions and save it as a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

convert-xml-xslfo-to-pdf.title: Convert XML with XSL‑FO to PDF using Aspose.Pdf
convert-xml-xslfo-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an XML file with an XSL‑FO stylesheet via Aspose.Pdf's XmlLoadOptions and saving the resulting PDF document.

load-pdf-and-save.title: Load PDF and Save to New File
load-pdf-and-save.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and saving it to a new file using the default options.

convert-latex-to-pdf.title: Convert LaTeX File to PDF
convert-latex-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load a LaTeX (.tex) file with TeXLoadOptions and save it as a PDF, keeping equations as vector graphics.

convert-ofd-to-pdf.title: Convert OFD File to PDF
convert-ofd-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading an OFD document with OfdLoadOptions and saving it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's default settings.

convert-pdf-to-epub.title: Convert PDF to EPUB
convert-pdf-to-epub.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and save it as an EPUB document using the default conversion settings.

convert-pdf-to-epub-with-cover.title: Convert PDF to EPUB with Custom Cover and Metadata
convert-pdf-to-epub-with-cover.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to EPUB using Aspose.Pdf, add a cover image as the first page, and set document metadata that is carried over to the EPUB.

convert-pdf-to-latex-using-texsaveoption.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX using TeXSaveOptions
convert-pdf-to-latex-using-texsaveoption.description: Loads a PDF file and saves it as a LaTeX (.tex) document using Aspose.Pdf's TeXSaveOptions, specifying an output directory for auxiliary files.

convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.title: Convert PDF to LaTeX with Custom Macro Definitions
convert-pdf-to-latex-with-custom-macros.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF file to a LaTeX (.tex) document using Aspose.Pdf and then prepending custom LaTeX macro definitions to the generated file.

convert-pdf-to-text-using-textdevice.title: Convert PDF to Text Using Aspose.Pdf TextDevice
convert-pdf-to-text-using-textdevice.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and extract its textual content page‑by‑page using the TextDevice class, writing the result to a plain‑text file.

convert-pdf-to-utf8-text.title: Convert PDF to UTF-8 Text with Preserved Line Breaks
convert-pdf-to-utf8-text.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extracting its text while preserving line breaks using Pure formatting mode, and saving the result to a UTF-8 encoded text file.

extract-visible-text-from-pdf.title: Extract Visible Text from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
extract-visible-text-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use TextAbsorber with pure formatting to extract only visible text, and write the result to a .txt file.

convert-pdf-to-xps-default.title: Convert PDF to XPS with Default Settings
convert-pdf-to-xps-default.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and saving it as an XPS file with XpsSaveOptions using the default configuration.

convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.title: Convert PDF to XPS with Custom Page Size and Orientation
convert-pdf-to-xps-custom-page-size.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply a custom page size to each page, and save the document as XPS using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-to-markdown-default-options.title: Convert PDF to Markdown with Default Options
convert-pdf-to-markdown-default-options.description: Shows how to load a PDF file and save it as a Markdown document using Aspose.Pdf's MarkdownSaveOptions with default settings.

convert-pdf-to-markdown-custom-heading.title: Convert PDF to Markdown with Custom Heading Mapping
convert-pdf-to-markdown-custom-heading.description: Loads a PDF file and saves it as a Markdown document using Aspose.Pdf's MarkdownSaveOptions with heuristic heading recognition and a custom heading level threshold.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml.title: Convert PDF to MobiXml using Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-mobixml.description: Shows how to load a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf and save it as a MobiXml file using the default MobiXmlSaveOptions.

convert-pdf-to-mobixml-with-custom-metad.title: Convert PDF to MobiXml with Custom Metadata
convert-pdf-to-mobixml-with-custom-metad.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding standard and custom metadata (author and publisher), and saving it as a MobiXml file using Aspose.Pdf.

pdf-to-png-bradley-contrast.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Bradley Contrast Enhancement
pdf-to-png-bradley-contrast.description: Demonstrates converting each page of a PDF to PNG using Aspose.Pdf and then applying the Bradley binarization algorithm to enhance image contrast before saving the results.

convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG with Transparent Background
convert-pdf-to-png-transparent-backgroun.description: Demonstrates converting each page of a PDF to PNG images while preserving transparency for pages that contain an alpha channel using Aspose.Pdf.

create-multi-page-tiff-from-pdf.title: Create Multi‑Page TIFF from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
create-multi-page-tiff-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and converting all its pages into a single multi‑page TIFF file using the default compression.

create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.title: Create Single-Page TIFF from First PDF Page
create-single-page-tiff-from-first-pdf-p.description: Demonstrates how to convert the first page of a PDF document to a single-page TIFF image using Aspose.Pdf's TiffDevice with custom resolution and compression settings.

convert-pdf-to-svg.title: Convert PDF to SVG with Aspose.Pdf
convert-pdf-to-svg.description: Shows how to load a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save it as an SVG file with SvgSaveOptions, enabling pixel scaling.

convert-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-output-fo.title: Convert PDF to SVG Files with Custom Output Folder
convert-pdf-to-svg-with-custom-output-fo.description: Shows how to convert a PDF document into separate SVG files per page using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and SvgSaveOptions, directing the output to a specific folder.
